description: A curated collection of notable trees spanning diverse families — from iconic baobabs (Bombacaceae) and frankincense trees (Burseraceae) to dragon trees (Dracaenaceae), monkey puzzle trees (Araucariaceae), and tree aloes (Aloaceae). Many are adapted to arid or semi-arid conditions, featuring swollen water-storing trunks (pachycaul habit), or are of special horticultural or conservation significance.
